svg.title: RDNA4 scalar flash attention: wave64 default vs wave32 fix, with measured Vulkan FA throughput on AMD Radeon Pro VII at three context depths
svg.desc: Left panel shows SIMD lane occupancy for scalar flash attention with Br equal to one. Top half labeled wave64 default has two stacked cycles where each cycle has the first 16 of 32 lanes filled green for useful KQ dot-product work and the remaining 16 lanes filled gray for idle lanes, marked 50 percent SIMD utilization. Bottom half labeled wave32 RDNA4 fix has two stacked wavefronts each running in one cycle, with 28 to 30 of 32 lanes filled green and a small partial-work tail in light yellow, marked greater than 90 percent SIMD utilization. Right panel is a grouped bar chart of measured Vulkan scalar FA throughput on AMD Radeon Pro VII at three context depths: pp512 d0 at 800 versus 828 tok per second plus 3.4 percent; pp512 d8192 at 174 versus 389 tok per second plus 122.9 percent; pp512 d16384 at 84 versus 247 tok per second plus 193.0 percent. A small inset shows tg128 at d16384 going from 41.5 to 57.7 tok per second plus 39.2 percent. Footer credits llama.cpp PR 19625, commit titled use wave32 on AMD RDNA for scalar FA.
svg.text: RDNA4 scalar flash attention: the wave32 default that closes the long-context gap
gfx1201 SIMD occupancy with Br=1, and measured Vulkan FA throughput on a sibling AMD card before and after PR 19625

g.text: SIMD lane occupancy on a single 32-lane gfx1201 SIMD
Scalar FA tile, Br = 1, head dim 128, one query position per workgroup
Each wave64 dispatch folds onto two cycles of one 32-lane SIMD
• max 8 wave64 in flight per SIMD
Each wave32 dispatch runs on one 32-lane SIMD in one cycle; two wavefronts interleaved
• max 16 wave32 in flight per SIMD
Measured Vulkan scalar FA throughput, Radeon Pro VII
llama 8B Q4_0, ngl 99, fa 1; before = b8500-era, after = PR 19625

svg.text: Source: llama.cpp PR 19625, commit "Use wave32 on AMD RDNA for scalar FA" by 0cc4m. Lane diagram is illustrative; the wave64 fold halves throughput on Br=1 scalar FA because the upper 16 lanes have no work for a one-row tile.
